name: GHOST by Codex
description: Phase 4A structured memory prod-ready artifact. Prepared for controlled cutover; do not activate directly.

parameters.query:
WITH requested_conversation AS (
  SELECT id, owner_user_id, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at
  FROM conversations
  WHERE id = NULLIF($1, '')::uuid
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT id, owner_user_id, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at
FROM requested_conversation
UNION ALL
SELECT
  NULL::uuid AS id,
  NULL::uuid AS owner_user_id,
  NULL::timestamptz AS created_at,
  NULL::timestamptz AS updated_at,
  NULL::timestamptz AS last_message_at
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM requested_conversation)
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO conversations (
  id,
  owner_user_id,
  title,
  source,
  status,
  metadata,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  last_message_at
)
VALUES (
  COALESCE(NULLIF($1, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000')::uuid, gen_random_uuid()),
  NULLIF($2, 'NULL')::uuid,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id AS conversation_id, owner_user_id, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at;

INSERT INTO messages (
  id,
  conversation_id,
  role,
  content,
  content_format,
  model_name,
  metadata,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  $1,
  'user',
  $2,
  'text',
  NULL,
  $3::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, conversation_id, role, content, created_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.conversation_id, $('Normalize Input').item.json.message, JSON.stringify({ source: 'ghost-chat-v3', type: 'user_message', entrypoint: $('Normalize Input').item.json.entrypoint || 'direct_webhook', n8n_execution_id: $('Normalize Input').item.json.n8n_execution_id || null })] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  role,
  content,
  content_format,
  model_name,
  metadata,
  created_at
FROM (
  SELECT
    role,
    content,
    content_format,
    model_name,
    metadata,
    created_at
  FROM messages
  WHERE conversation_id = $1
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 12
) recent_messages
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

assignments.name: system_prompt
assignments.value:
={{ "You are Ghost 🔮 — an efficient, direct AI assistant.
" + "Be concise, useful, and factual.
" + "Do not use filler.
" + "Do not pretend certainty when unsure.
" + "Prefer practical answers.
" + "When context exists in the conversation, use it.
" + "When the user asks for code or technical help, be precise and implementation-oriented.
" }}

assignments.name: conversation_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Touch Conversation Timestamp').item.json.conversation_id || $('Create New Conversation').item.json.conversation_id || $('Use Existing Conversation Context').item.json.conversation_id || '' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const messages = item.messages || [];
const lastUser = [...messages].reverse().find((message) => message.role === "user");
const text = (lastUser?.content || "").toLowerCase();

const lightweightLocalSignals = [
  "summarize",
  "summary",
  "classify",
  "classification",
  "extract",
  "extraction",
  "tag",
  "tags",
  "title",
  "rename",
  "metadata",
  "rewrite briefly",
  "shorten",
  "bullet points",
  "tl;dr",
  "keywords",
  "categorize",
  "sentiment",
];

const technicalWorkSignals = [
  "code",
  "python",
  "javascript",
  "typescript",
  "sql",
  "bash",
  "shell",
  "script",
  "regex",
  "bug",
  "debug",
  "stack trace",
  "exception",
  "error",
  "fix",
  "refactor",
  "function",
  "class",
  "module",
  "api",
  "json",
  "yaml",
  "docker",
  "docker compose",
  "container",
  "kubernetes",
  "linux",
  "terminal",
  "cli",
  "database",
  "postgres",
  "query",
  "migration",
  "schema",
  "nginx",
  "config",
  "deploy",
  "deployment",
  "devops",
  "infrastructure",
  "repository",
  "repo",
  "git",
  "test failure",
  "failing test",
  "compile",
  "build failed",
  "implementation",
];

const technicalIntentSignals = [
  "write a",
  "implement",
  "update the code",
  "modify the workflow",
  "patch",
  "edit the file",
  "run this command",
  "investigate",
  "why is this failing",
  "how do i fix",
];

let request_type = "chat";

if (lightweightLocalSignals.some((signal) => text.includes(signal))) {
  request_type = "lightweight_local_task";
}

if (
  technicalWorkSignals.some((signal) => text.includes(signal)) ||
  technicalIntentSignals.some((signal) => text.includes(signal))
) {
  request_type = "technical_work";
}

return [{ json: { ...item, request_type } }];

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.conversation_id, $json.reply, $json.model_used || null, { provider_used: $json.provider_used || null, task_class: $json.task_class || null, approval_required: $json.approval_required || false, risk_level: $json.risk_level || 'safe', risk_reasons: $json.risk_reasons || [], task_summary: $json.task_summary || '', command_success: $json.command_success === true, command_exit_code: $json.command_exit_code !== undefined && $json.command_exit_code !== null ? $json.command_exit_code : null, stdout_summary: $json.stdout_summary || '', stderr_summary: $json.stderr_summary || '', artifact_path: $json.artifact_path || null, codex_command_status: $json.codex_command_status || 'not_applicable', error_type: $json.error_type || null, delegation_id: $json.delegation_id || null, orchestration_task_id: $json.orchestration_task_id || null, runtime_task_id: $json.runtime_task_id || null, worker_conversation_id: $json.worker_conversation_id || null, n8n_execution_id: $json.n8n_execution_id || null, response_mode: $json.response_mode || 'direct_owner_reply', parent_owner_label: $json.parent_owner_label || null }] }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, openai_request: { model: item.selected_model, input: item.prompt, instructions: item.system_prompt, temperature: item.config?.openai?.temperature ?? 0.6, max_output_tokens: item.config?.openai?.max_output_tokens ?? 1200 } } }];

const response = $input.first().json;
const context = $('Build OpenAI Chat Request').item.json;
const output = Array.isArray(response.output) ? response.output : [];
const outputText = response.output_text
  || output.flatMap(part => Array.isArray(part.content) ? part.content : [])
    .map(content => content.text || content.value || '')
    .join('')
  || response.response?.output_text
  || response.response
  || '[no-openai-reply]';
return [{ json: {
  ...context,
  ...response,
  reply: outputText,
  approval_required: context.approval_required || false,
  risk_level: context.risk_level || 'safe',
  risk_reasons: context.risk_reasons || [],
  risk_codes: context.risk_codes || [],
  task_summary: context.task_summary || '',
  command_success: true,
  command_exit_code: null,
  stdout_summary: '',
  stderr_summary: '',
  artifact_path: '',
  codex_command_status: 'not_applicable',
  error_type: '',
} }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE conversations
SET
  updated_at = NOW(),
  last_message_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id AS conversation_id, updated_at, last_message_at;

UPDATE conversations
SET
  updated_at = NOW(),
  last_message_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id AS conversation_id, updated_at, last_message_at;

WITH prioritized_memory AS (
  SELECT
    scope,
    memory_type,
    summary,
    created_at,
    importance,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(details_json->>'topic_key', ''), lower(summary)) AS dedupe_key,
    CASE scope
      WHEN 'conversation' THEN 0
      WHEN 'global' THEN 1
      ELSE 2
    END AS scope_rank,
    CASE memory_type
      WHEN 'decision' THEN 0
      WHEN 'environment_fact' THEN 1
      WHEN 'operational_note' THEN 2
      WHEN 'task_summary' THEN 3
      WHEN 'conversation_summary' THEN 4
      ELSE 9
    END AS type_rank
  FROM ghost_memory
  WHERE status = 'active'
    AND (
      conversation_id = NULLIF($1, '')::uuid
      OR (
        scope = 'global'
        AND memory_type IN ('decision', 'environment_fact', 'operational_note')
        AND importance >= 4
      )
    )
), deduped_memory AS (
  SELECT
    scope,
    memory_type,
    summary,
    created_at,
    importance,
    scope_rank,
    type_rank,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY scope, dedupe_key
      ORDER BY type_rank ASC, importance DESC, created_at DESC
    ) AS dedupe_rank
  FROM prioritized_memory
), conversation_memory AS (
  SELECT
    scope,
    memory_type,
    summary,
    created_at,
    importance,
    scope_rank,
    type_rank,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY type_rank ASC, importance DESC, created_at DESC
    ) AS scope_row
  FROM deduped_memory
  WHERE dedupe_rank = 1
    AND scope = 'conversation'
), global_memory AS (
  SELECT
    scope,
    memory_type,
    summary,
    created_at,
    importance,
    scope_rank,
    type_rank,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY type_rank ASC, importance DESC, created_at DESC
    ) AS scope_row
  FROM deduped_memory
  WHERE dedupe_rank = 1
    AND scope = 'global'
)
SELECT scope, memory_type, summary, created_at, importance
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM conversation_memory WHERE scope_row <= 4
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM global_memory WHERE scope_row <= 2
) memory_items
ORDER BY scope_rank ASC, type_rank ASC, importance DESC, created_at DESC;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Touch Conversation Timestamp').item.json.conversation_id || $('Create New Conversation').item.json.conversation_id || $('Use Existing Conversation Context').item.json.conversation_id || '' }}

return [{ json: { ...item, output_text: 'not valid json', memory_extractor_debug: 'invalid_json' } }];

parameters.query:
WITH input_rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS x(
    scope TEXT,
    memory_type TEXT,
    conversation_id UUID,
    task_run_id UUID,
    source_message_id UUID,
    title TEXT,
    summary TEXT,
    details_json JSONB,
    importance SMALLINT,
    status TEXT
  )
), validated AS (
  SELECT
    gen_random_uuid() AS id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    NULLIF(title, '') AS title,
    summary,
    COALESCE(details_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS details_json,
    GREATEST(1, LEAST(5, COALESCE(importance, 3)))::smallint AS importance,
    COALESCE(status, 'active') AS status
  FROM input_rows
  WHERE scope IN ('global', 'conversation', 'task')
    AND memory_type IN ('task_summary', 'decision', 'environment_fact', 'operational_note', 'conversation_summary')
    AND COALESCE(status, 'active') IN ('active', 'superseded', 'archived')
    AND NULLIF(summary, '') IS NOT NULL
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO ghost_memory (
    id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    title,
    summary,
    details_json,
    importance,
    status
  )
  SELECT
    id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    title,
    summary,
    details_json,
    importance,
    status
  FROM validated
  RETURNING id, scope, memory_type, conversation_id, summary, details_json, created_at
), superseded AS (
  UPDATE ghost_memory older
  SET status = 'superseded', updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted newer
  WHERE older.id <> newer.id
    AND older.status = 'active'
    AND older.memory_type = newer.memory_type
    AND older.scope = newer.scope
    AND older.memory_type IN ('decision', 'environment_fact', 'operational_note')
    AND COALESCE(older.conversation_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid) = COALESCE(newer.conversation_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid)
    AND (
      (
        COALESCE(NULLIF(newer.details_json->>'topic_key', ''), '') <> ''
        AND NULLIF(older.details_json->>'topic_key', '') = NULLIF(newer.details_json->>'topic_key', '')
      )
      OR lower(older.summary) = lower(newer.summary)
    )
  RETURNING older.id
)
SELECT
  inserted.id,
  inserted.scope,
  inserted.memory_type,
  inserted.summary,
  inserted.created_at,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superseded) AS superseded_count
FROM inserted;

SELECT
  task_id::text,
  task_run_id::text
FROM public.ghost_runtime_start_task_ledger(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  $2,
  $3,
  'webhook/ghost-chat-v3',
  'GHOST by Codex',
  $4::jsonb,
  $5::jsonb
);

SELECT public.ghost_runtime_complete_task_ledger(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  NULLIF($2, '')::uuid,
  200,
  $3::jsonb,
  NULLIF($4, '')::uuid,
  NULLIF($5, ''),
  NULLIF($6, ''),
  NULLIF($7, ''),
  COALESCE($8, false),
  $9,
  NULLIF($10, ''),
  NULLIF($11, ''),
  NULLIF($12, ''),
  NULLIF($13, '')
);

SELECT
  conversation_id::text,
  owner_agent_id::text,
  owner_agent_key,
  owner_label,
  owner_provider,
  owner_model,
  owner_locked_at,
  owner_was_created
FROM public.ghost_ensure_conversation_owner(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid
);

SELECT
  delegation_id::text,
  orchestration_task_id::text,
  worker_conversation_id::text,
  worker_agent_id::text,
  worker_agent_label,
  worker_provider,
  worker_model
FROM public.ghost_create_conversation_delegation(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  NULLIF($2, '')::uuid,
  NULLIF($3, ''),
  NULLIF($4, ''),
  NULLIF($5, ''),
  $6,
  $7::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO messages (
  id,
  conversation_id,
  role,
  content,
  content_format,
  model_name,
  metadata,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  'user',
  $2,
  'text',
  NULL,
  $3::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id::text, conversation_id::text, role, content, created_at;

SELECT public.ghost_finalize_delegation(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  NULL,
  'blocked',
  $2,
  NULL
);

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Build Delegation Context').item.json;
const reasons = Array.isArray(item.risk_reasons) && item.risk_reasons.length
  ? item.risk_reasons.join(' ')
  : 'Risk policy requires review before Ghost can start the delegated worker session.';
const reply = [
  `${item.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost'} kept this conversation under its current owner and opened a delegated worker task instead of silently switching models.`,
  `Execution is blocked pending approval. The delegated task is now visible on the Task Board for review.`,
  reasons,
].join('\n\n');
return [{ json: {
  conversation_id: item.conversation_id || '',
  reply,
  provider_used: item.parent_provider || '',
  model_used: item.parent_model || '',
  task_class: item.task_class || 'technical_work',
  approval_required: true,
  risk_level: item.risk_level || 'caution',
  risk_reasons: item.risk_reasons || [],
  task_summary: item.task_summary || '',
  command_success: false,
  command_exit_code: null,
  stdout_summary: '',
  stderr_summary: reasons,
  artifact_path: '',
  codex_command_status: 'blocked_pending_approval',
  error_type: 'delegation_blocked_pending_approval',
  delegation_id: item.delegation_id || '',
  orchestration_task_id: item.orchestration_task_id || '',
  runtime_task_id: null,
  worker_conversation_id: item.worker_conversation_id || '',
  n8n_execution_id: item.n8n_execution_id || null,
  response_mode: 'delegated_blocked',
  parent_owner_label: item.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost',
} }];

parameters.query:
SELECT public.ghost_finalize_delegation(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  NULL,
  'blocked',
  $2,
  NULL
);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.delegation_id || '', $json.unsupported_result_summary || 'Delegated worker execution is queued for later handling.'] }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Build Delegation Context').item.json;
const workerLabel = item.worker_agent_label || item.delegated_provider || 'the delegated worker';
const reply = [
  `${item.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost'} kept ownership of this conversation and opened delegated work for ${workerLabel}.`,
  'The work is now visible on the Task Board, but only explicit Codex execution is wired in this phase.',
].join('\n\n');
return [{ json: {
  conversation_id: item.conversation_id || '',
  reply,
  provider_used: item.parent_provider || '',
  model_used: item.parent_model || '',
  task_class: item.task_class || 'technical_work',
  approval_required: false,
  risk_level: item.risk_level || 'safe',
  risk_reasons: item.risk_reasons || [],
  task_summary: item.task_summary || '',
  command_success: false,
  command_exit_code: null,
  stdout_summary: '',
  stderr_summary: item.unsupported_result_summary || '',
  artifact_path: '',
  codex_command_status: 'queued_for_worker',
  error_type: 'delegation_execution_not_available',
  delegation_id: item.delegation_id || '',
  orchestration_task_id: item.orchestration_task_id || '',
  runtime_task_id: null,
  worker_conversation_id: item.worker_conversation_id || '',
  n8n_execution_id: item.n8n_execution_id || null,
  response_mode: 'delegated_queued',
  parent_owner_label: item.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost',
} }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  task_id::text,
  task_run_id::text
FROM public.ghost_start_delegation_runtime(
  NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
  'delegated_codex_session',
  'GHOST by Codex',
  $2::jsonb,
  $3::jsonb
);

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Build Delegation Context').item.json;
const runtime = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  ...item,
  task_id: runtime.task_id || '',
  task_run_id: runtime.task_run_id || '',
  conversation_id: item.worker_conversation_id || '',
  selected_model: item.delegated_model || 'gpt-5.4',
  provider: item.delegated_provider || 'codex_oauth_worker',
  provider_used: item.delegated_provider || 'codex_oauth_worker',
  model_used: item.delegated_model || 'gpt-5.4',
  prompt: item.worker_execution_prompt || item.worker_message_content || item.task_summary || '',
  config: item.config || {},
  approval_required: false,
  risk_level: item.risk_level || 'safe',
  risk_reasons: item.risk_reasons || [],
  task_summary: item.task_summary || '',
  n8n_execution_id: item.n8n_execution_id || '',
} }];

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.worker_conversation_id || '', $json.reply || '', $json.model_used || null, { provider_used: $json.provider_used || null, task_class: 'delegated_worker_task', delegation_id: $json.delegation_id || null, orchestration_task_id: $json.orchestration_task_id || null, runtime_task_id: $json.task_id || null, command_success: $json.command_success === true, command_exit_code: $json.command_exit_code !== undefined && $json.command_exit_code !== null ? $json.command_exit_code : null, stdout_summary: $json.stdout_summary || '', stderr_summary: $json.stderr_summary || '', artifact_path: $json.artifact_path || null, codex_command_status: $json.codex_command_status || 'not_applicable', error_type: $json.error_type || null, n8n_execution_id: $json.n8n_execution_id || null, worker_execution: true }] }}

parameters.query:
WITH runtime_ledger AS (
  SELECT public.ghost_runtime_complete_task_ledger(
    NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
    NULLIF($2, '')::uuid,
    200,
    $3::jsonb,
    NULLIF($4, '')::uuid,
    'delegated_worker_task',
    NULLIF($5, ''),
    NULLIF($6, ''),
    FALSE,
    $7,
    NULLIF($8, ''),
    NULLIF($9, ''),
    NULLIF($10, ''),
    'delegated_codex_session'
  ) AS runtime_completed
),
delegation_finalized AS (
  SELECT public.ghost_finalize_delegation(
    NULLIF($11, '')::uuid,
    NULLIF($1, '')::uuid,
    NULLIF($12, ''),
    $13,
    NULLIF($10, '')
  ) AS delegation_completed
)
SELECT runtime_completed, delegation_completed
FROM runtime_ledger, delegation_finalized;

WITH target_event AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM tool_events
  WHERE task_id = NULLIF($1, '')::uuid
    AND event_type = 'delegation_completed'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
UPDATE tool_events AS te
SET
  task_run_id = COALESCE(te.task_run_id, NULLIF($2, '')::uuid),
  payload = COALESCE(te.payload, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
    'task_run_id', NULLIF($2, ''),
    'n8n_execution_id', NULLIF($3, '')
  )
FROM target_event
WHERE te.id = target_event.id
  AND NULLIF($3, '') IS NOT NULL
RETURNING te.id::text AS tool_event_id;

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Normalize Delegated Codex Reply').item.json;
const parent = $('Build Delegation Context').item.json;
const workerLabel = parent.worker_agent_label || 'Codex Worker';
const failureLabel = item.error_type === 'delegated_worker_timeout'
  ? 'timed out'
  : item.error_type === 'delegated_worker_invalid_result'
    ? 'returned an invalid result'
    : 'reported a failure';
const summary = item.command_success
  ? `${parent.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost'} delegated this work to ${workerLabel} in a separate worker session and kept the parent conversation under Ghost ownership.`
  : `${parent.parent_owner_label || 'Ghost'} delegated this work to ${workerLabel}, but the worker session ${failureLabel}.`;
const workerBlock = item.reply ? `Worker result:\n${item.reply}` : (item.stderr_summary || 'No additional worker output was captured.');
return [{ json: {
  conversation_id: parent.conversation_id || '',
  reply: [summary, workerBlock].join('\n\n'),
  provider_used: parent.parent_provider || '',
  model_used: parent.parent_model || '',
  task_class: parent.task_class || 'technical_work',
  approval_required: false,
  risk_level: parent.risk_level || 'safe',
  risk_reasons: parent.risk_reasons || [],
  task_summary: parent.task_summary || '',
  command_success: item.command_success === true,
  command_exit_code: item.command_exit_code !== undefined ? item.command_exit_code : null,
  stdout_summary: item.stdout_summary || '',
  stderr_summary: item.stderr_summary || '',
  artifact_path: item.artifact_path || '',
